---
title: Comment, Like, Subscribe!
author: Christopher Nam
date: '2026-03-25'
slug: comment-like-subscribe
categories: []
tags: [extra, features]
draft: no
output:
  blogdown::html_page:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 1
    highlight: pygments
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, include = FALSE}
library(here)
here("static")

preamble_dir <- here("static", "code", "R", "preamble")
preamble_file  <- "post_preamble.R"

source(file.path(preamble_dir, preamble_file))
```


```{=html}
<div class="flex-container">

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/cPbYFhG2lyM?si=Tdco-rimYi65oIYj" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

</div>
```


# Your Task
> Never miss a The Median Duck post; most up-to-date reader wins!
> 
> Participate in The Median Duck Peanut Gallery chatter; most active reader wins!

```{r, out.width = "40%", fig.cap = "Daddy's interest has been piqued...and is disappointed by the lack of apostrophe for 'Papas attention'."}
knitr::include_graphics("https://media1.tenor.com/m/hq---sEvZbsAAAAC/greg-davies-taskmaster.gif")
```

# Extra, Extra! Read All About It!
**Readers!** 

Have you found it highly inconvenient to find out if there is a newly published Median Duck post? If yes, then fear no more![^hope]

[^hope]: hopefully

You can now be e-mailed as to when a new post has been published. Simply use the RSS feed information associated with this site, and use [feedrabbit.com](https://feedrabbit.com/) to be e-mailed as to when there is a new post. Other RSS feed e-mailers are available ([follow.it](https://follow.it/), [blogtrottr](https://blogtrottr.com/)).


:::{ .insights}
**Signing up can be achieved in 2 simple steps! [^terms]**

1. Choose your preferred RSS feed e-mailer platform: [feedrabbit.com](https://feedrabbit.com/), [follow.it](https://follow.it/) or  [blogtrottr](https://blogtrottr.com/).
    - Signing up to these services may be required. 
2. In the *"URL of a feed or web site"* input field (or similarly labelled), provide the following address: [https://bluevolvo87.github.io/themedianduck/index.xml](https://bluevolvo87.github.io/themedianduck/index.xml).


[^terms]: May be more (probably less than 10), if additional sign up and confirmations are required. The Median Duck has no responsibility in these additional steps/w

:::


**Some considerations:**

- Additional steps to sign up and confirm usage of these RSS feed e-mailers may be required.
- By going with a external third party RSS e-mailer, The Median Duck does not have access to your e-mail address or personal information that you provided.
    - This is great for readers who do not want to share their details with a mysterious blog poster who has questionable stats, writing and musical skills.
- These dedicated third party e-mailers also allow for the reader to control the frequency in which they receive e-mails.
    - The reader can control how frequently they are spammed, and confounded by the contents featured on this blog.

```{r, out.width = "40%", fig.cap = "The Taskmaster himself giving an accurate portrayal of how to subscribe to The Median Duck feed..."}
knitr::include_graphics("https://media1.tenor.com/m/9YD887uFEzIAAAAC/taskmaster-greg-davies.gif")
```


# Be the First to Say "First!"
**Readers!**

Have you ever wanted to:

- interact with the writer of The Median Duck, but still remain safely anonymous?
- interact with rest of The Median Duck community (henceforth known as **"The Flock"**)?
- share your opinion on a Median Duck post?
- point out incoherent (and correct) English that frequently occurs on this blog?
- violently object to a statistical method or conclusion that is being stated?
- add a redundant *"First!"* comment on a Median Duck post?

...then look no further! Commenting on posts has now been enabled for The Median Duck.

Thanks to [cusdis](https://cusdis.com/), a *"lightweight, privacy-first, open-source comment system"*, all posts now have a comment section at the very bottom of the page. 


```{r, out.width = "40%", fig.cap = "How I anticipate the comment section to progress over time."}
knitr::include_graphics("https://media1.tenor.com/m/O87z2UmDieEAAAAC/taskmaster-greg-davies.gif
")
```

**Some considerations:**

- No additional sign up is required to yet another third party website.
- The Median Duck doesn't store any private information on the commenter.
    - You (the reader) can stay anonymous behind the safety of your own screen! 
    - Trolls and spammers can also rejoice at the low barrier of commenting entry.
- Comments will be vetted and reviewed by the webmaster:
    - Readers can no doubt expect some biased comment selection here.

```{r, out.width = "40%", fig.cap = "The Flock's Mantra on The Median Duck."}
knitr::include_graphics("https://media1.tenor.com/m/OpT8wvaIrK4AAAAC/destroy-taskmaster.gif")
```


The following resources were incredibly useful in enabling this commenting feature:

- [Cusdis setup, specifically for hugo based websites.](https://discourse.gohugo.io/t/free-and-open-source-comments-for-hugo/32940)
- [Detailed guide on how to add the Cusdis widget onto posts automatically](https://barthpaleologue.github.io/Blog/posts/add-and-customize-cusdis-hugo/)
- [How to customise the style of Cusdis widget](https://talk.jekyllrb.com/t/comments-with-cusdis/6896)


# What Have We Learnt Today?

:::{.infobox .today}

```{r, out.width = "30%", fig.cap = "The seal of approval from the Little man himself."}
knitr::include_graphics("https://media1.tenor.com/m/4Vu14pZOVFkAAAAC/alex-horne-taskmaster.gif")
```

We've learnt:

- **How to never miss out on a Median Duck post!**
    - Readers have been instructed on how to get e-mailed on latest post via an RSS feed.
- **A commenting feature has been enabled on The Median Duck!**
    - Readers can now object to the content being posted, and provide redundant comments such as *"First!"*, or *"Come to Brazil!!!!"*.
- **The Median Duck is not interested in readers' personal information and respects their privacy!**
    - The Median Duck is also a lazy cheapskate, favouring (free) open source third party platforms, and making his readers do all the work in terms of subscribing to a feed.
- **The Median Duck community is henceforth known as The Flock.**


```{=html}
<div class="flex-container">

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/OLXaJRjC5CE?si=wflKdNqlk8-D9w4z" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

</div>
```
:::
